zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Galloway於1144年出生在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾時，她的父親Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway23歲，母親Gunhilda of Allerdale20歲。她和Theobald DeBerkeley至少有2個兒子。她去世於1173年在蘇格蘭享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Galloway于1144年出生在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾时，她的父亲Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway23岁，母亲Gunhilda of Allerdale20岁。她和Theobald DeBerkeley至少有2个儿子。她去世于1173年在苏格兰享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Galloway was born in 1144, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, was 23 and her mother, Gunhilda of Allerdale, was 20. She had at least 2 sons with Theobald DeBerkeley. She died in 1173, in Scotland, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Galloway est née en 1144, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Gunhilda of Allerdale, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Theobald DeBerkeley. Elle est décédée en 1173, à Écosse, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Galloway 1144 in Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway 23 und ihre Mutter Gunhilda of Allerdale 20. Sie hatte mit Theobald DeBerkeley mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1173 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Galloway è nata il nel 1144 nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Gunhilda of Allerdale, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Theobald DeBerkeley. Morì nel 1173, nel Scotland, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Gallowayが1144年にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Gallowayは23歳，母Gunhilda of Allerdaleは20歳であった。彼女はTheobald DeBerkeleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1173年にスコットランドで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Galloway(이)가 1144년 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gunhilda of Allerdale(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Theobald DeBerkeley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 스컷랜드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Galloway nasceu em 1144, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Gunhilda of Allerdale, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Theobald DeBerkeley. Ela faleceu em 1173, em Scotland, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Galloway родилась в 1144 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Gunhilda of Allerdale, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Theobald DeBerkeley. Она умерла в 1173 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva de Galloway nació en 1144, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Gunhilda of Allerdale, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Theobald DeBerkeley. Murió en 1173, en Scotland, a la edad de 29 años.
